summary: Fix 8 high-severity tech-debt review findings (ISS-20260630-001~008) in apps/desktop: openInFinder path validation, MessagePartsRenderer memoization, tsconfig @superset/shared alias misuse, host-service-coordinator re-export + singleton, noImplicitAny restoration, Biome introduction for tab-indent files, and crypto.randomUUID for tab/pane IDs. Scope is defensive hardening + correctness + architectural boundary cleanup; no new user-facing features.
approach: Decompose into 6 feature-level tasks grouped by cohesion: (1) tsconfig fix bundles ISS-005 noImplicitAny:true + ISS-003 @superset/shared→@main alias adjustment since both touch tsconfig.json and need the same typecheck gate; ISS-003 import edits are co-located because the alias decision is per-target. Verified alias inventory: @superset/local-db has 7 import sites (1 runtime value import in main/index.full.ts:3 + 6 type-only imports across renderer commandPalette/components/lib); @superset/shared/* main-layer violations (agent-command, shell-ready-scanner, workspace-launch, simple-git-options) ~7 imports; @superset/pty-daemon/* 2 imports; @superset/chat/server/*, @superset/workspace-fs/host, @superset/port-scanner each a small number. @superset/mcp-v2/tools/register is NOT migratable (runtime dynamic import in maestro-mcp-provider.ts:570 + declare-module stub in superset-registry.d.ts — Phase 3 safety net, kept on keep-list). (2) host-service-coordinator bundles ISS-007 singleton + ISS-004 re-export removal — same file. (3) openInFinder path validation (ISS-001). (4) MessagePartsRenderer memo refactor (ISS-002), isolated due to streaming-render sensitivity. (5) tabs/store crypto.randomUUID (ISS-008). (6) Biome introduction + tab-indent conversion (ISS-006). Waves order low-risk independent fixes first (Wave 1), then architecture-sensitive tsconfig + UI refactor (Wave 2), finally Biome tooling last (Wave 3) so its file reformatting does not collide with other tasks' edits. ISS-006 file paths corrected after verification: auth-functions.ts at src/lib/trpc/routers/auth/utils/, workspace-navigation.ts at src/renderer/routes/_authenticated/_dashboard/utils/, link-providers-stub.ts at src/renderer/lib/terminal/, link-providers-route.d.ts at src/types/. Verified ISS-004 consumer: src/lib/trpc/routers/host-service-coordinator/index.ts:5 imports type HostServiceStatusEvent from the coordinator re-export — must be redirected to shared/host-info-types. Verified ISS-005: codebase already typechecks clean with noImplicitAny:true. Verified no existing Biome config or lint script in apps/desktop (AGENTS.md references bun run lint:fix but the script is absent — Biome task will add it).

waves.description: Low-risk independent single-file fixes: host-service-coordinator singleton+re-export (ISS-004/007), openInFinder path validation (ISS-001), tabs/store crypto.randomUUID (ISS-008). No cross-task dependencies, safe to parallelize.

Architecture-sensitive changes requiring focused verification: tsconfig noImplicitAny:true + @superset/shared→@main alias adjustment (ISS-005/003, needs typecheck gate), and MessagePartsRenderer useCallback/memo refactor (ISS-002, needs streaming-render UI verification). Independent of each other but both touch stability-sensitive surfaces.

Biome tooling introduction last: install @biomejs/biome, create biome.json (useTabs:true), convert 12 space-indented files to tabs, add lint:fix script. Run after other tasks complete so reformatting does not conflict with concurrent edits. [UI-observable] not applicable — pure formatting/tooling, no behavior change.

stages: Wave 1: surgical single-file fixes (path validation, singleton, UUID IDs)
Wave 2: tsconfig + alias migration gated by typecheck; UI memo refactor gated by streaming render check
Wave 3: Biome tooling install + indent normalization on 12 files
Convergence: all tasks gated by bun run typecheck exits 0 and grep-verified criteria

design_decisions: Bundle ISS-005 + ISS-003 into one tsconfig task: both edit tsconfig.json and share the typecheck verification gate; splitting would duplicate the read_first/verification overhead and risk conflicting tsconfig edits in parallel.

ISS-003 alias strategy: keep @superset/shared/* ONLY for targets resolving to src/shared/* (true shared types). Redirect main-layer targets (@superset/shared/agent-command, shell-ready-scanner, workspace-launch, simple-git-options, pty-daemon/*, port-scanner, local-db [7 import sites: main/index.full.ts:3 runtime value import + 6 renderer type-only imports across commandPalette/components/lib], chat, workspace-fs-host) to @main/* or lib/* paths. KEEP @superset/mcp-v2/tools/register unchanged — runtime dynamic import safety net (maestro-mcp-provider.ts:570) + declare-module stub (superset-registry.d.ts), NOT main-layer pollution. Renderer-side @superset/shared/agent-launch imports resolve to src/shared/agent-launch.ts (correctly shared) — keep those. Do NOT touch @superset/ui/* stubs (separate concern, not in scope).

ISS-004 fix: remove the `export type { ... }` re-export block (lines 16-25 of host-service-coordinator.ts); redirect the single type consumer (host-service-coordinator router) to `import type { HostServiceStatusEvent } from 'shared/host-info-types'`. Runtime-function consumers (getHostId, getHostServiceCoordinator) are unaffected since they import values, not types.

ISS-006 file paths verified-correct: auth-functions.ts→src/lib/trpc/routers/auth/utils/, workspace-navigation.ts→src/renderer/routes/_authenticated/_dashboard/utils/, link-providers-stub.ts→src/renderer/lib/terminal/, link-providers-route.d.ts→src/types/. The remaining 8 files (host-info-types.ts, host-service-coordinator.ts, process-tree-stub.ts, tabs/store.ts, tiptap-utils.ts, presets/index.ts, stores/index.ts, tsconfig.json) match the original list.

Biome config: useTabs:true to match the dominant codebase convention (existing files use tabs); scope formatter with an explicit `files.includes` allowlist or rely on default then run `biome format --write` only on the 12 targets to avoid reformatting the whole codebase in one PR.
Wave ordering puts Biome (TASK-006) last because it rewrites whitespace in files other tasks may edit; running it earlier would cause merge conflicts or mask intended edits with formatter changes.

ISS-002 keeps the existing `components` useMemo but extracts the inline `a` component to a module-level `React.memo` component and wraps `renderParts` in `useCallback` — minimal change to stabilize React node identity during streaming without altering render output.
Recommended_execution: Agent — each task is well-scoped with grep-verifiable criteria and concrete file paths; no task requires human judgment checkpoints.

patterns: tRPC publicProcedure with z.input validation (external router)
React.useCallback + React.memo for streaming render stabilization
conventions: Tab indentation (project standard; 12 legacy files use 2-space)
TypeScript strict mode + paths aliases (@main/*, @shared/*, shared/*)
Bun monorepo: apps/desktop is the only package; commands run via cd apps/desktop && bun run <script>
No existing Biome config or lint script — TASK-006 introduces both

pressure_pass.notes: P4 round 1 修订后：files[] 补全 13 文件（含 7 处 local-db 消费者）、mcp-v2 保留策略正确、keep-list 完整、注释排除 grep 加固。TASK-004 read_first 路径已修正。

boundary_warning.conflict: TASK-001(wave2,改注释) 与 TASK-002(wave1,改代码) 同文件
boundary_warning.resolution: wave 隔离保证顺序执行，修改性质不同(注释 vs 代码逻辑)，non-blocking。建议 TASK-001 depends_on TASK-002 以显式化。

conflicts.resolution: wave 隔离 (wave1 TASK-002 → wave2 TASK-001) + 修改性质不同 (代码 vs 注释)
